steps.title: Read the performance evidence
steps.content: The colon introduces evidence about the computer program's performance compared with the road-map method. The program identified sidewalks more accurately and could even distinguish between concrete and brick.

steps.title: Pick the comparison word
steps.content: A is too vague because the issue is not simply change. B does not describe performance, and C contradicts the evidence that the program did better. The blank needs a word meaning better than another method. The answer is D.
